title: Personalized Bīja Mantra Guide
description: A guide to personalized bīja (seed) mantras — the selection, application, and contemplative use of single-syllable sound-forms in tantric practice. Covers the major bījas (hrīṁ, klīṁ, hūṁ, aiṁ, srīṁ, krauṁ) and their applications.. Moderate caution. Preserved here as heritage / source material. Not instructional.
